sections.heading: Default approach
sections.text: For a three-phase grid-tied inverter with an LCL filter, use dq current regulation with PLL-based synchronization and treat resonance damping as a first-class design requirement.

sections.heading: Constraint
sections.text: Do not assume the LCL resonance is benign. Active damping or equivalent passive damping should be represented in the controller design context before increasing current-loop bandwidth.
